# Built by Joseph

Joseph Huckabee is a New York-based front-end developer and digital designer focused on accessible HTML, CSS, JavaScript, UX/UI design, brand identity, data analytics, and business-facing digital tools.

## Key Pages

- Home: https://builtbyjoseph.com/
- Coding portfolio: https://builtbyjoseph.com/portfolio/
- Design and logo work: https://builtbyjoseph.com/logos/
- Contact: https://builtbyjoseph.com/contact/

## Featured Work

- Anthropos: civic housing project using HTML, CSS, and JavaScript.
- Sirius: editorial space-news project using HTML, CSS, and JavaScript.
- Historical Glass Museum: museum web project using HTML, CSS, and JavaScript.
- Hair Color Portfolio: client-facing visual portfolio using HTML, CSS, and JavaScript.

## Contact

Use https://builtbyjoseph.com/contact/ for project inquiries.
